candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current assets component, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents without disposal restrictions
candidates.why: Subset of cash, not the full total if restricted cash exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents with disposal restrictions
candidates.why: Restricted subset only, not total cash.

variables.notes: Preferred the full reported cash total over restricted/unrestricted components.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; relevant STD component.
Current financial debt net of lease liabilities, which aligns well with baseline STD excluding leases.
Current financial debts total likely includes lease liabilities, so less suitable for baseline STD.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a label outside the shortlist because it appears to represent current financial debt excluding the separate lease-liability line, matching the baseline STD definition better than total current financial debts or LT Debt Within 1 Year alone.

candidates.why: Exact semantic match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities; appears in both current and non-current sections, but the current-section occurrence is the intended mapping.

variables.notes: The label appears in both current and non-current liability sections; selected the current-section occurrence for taxes payable.

candidates.why: Best reported total PPE line on the balance sheet; preferable to component or gross detail lines.
Would be gross tangible assets, but values are blank and less preferable than reported PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment in progress, Net

variables.notes: Preferred the main PPE total line.
Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in net working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital movements, not the final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
